so it takes what made me love Rage against the machine’s killing in the name and turns it to 11

we been to a cardiologist NotLikeThis
pupper has water in her lungs due to heart deficiencies. got prescribed a whole papyrus of meds. very expensive shit.
not infection, swelling. her heart not working well enough to pump blood to drain liquid.
@WizardWithAKnif I’m sorry, hopefully the pupper gets better
she's borking right now and looks alive, i'll let her rest for today
she deserved some rest with the appointments these days
yeah, they said less physical stress is better.
medication, for the rest of her life bradSHRUG
I’d be a terrible vet. “so what’s wrong with my dog?” dunno, was petting them for 3 hours.
Is this shot on a PS2   EYE toy xD
i also need to somehow collect da piss, and bring it back to the vet.
i tried to do it while we were waiting for the results, they gave me a jar, and ended up scooping everything with the snow wizard353KEK

and expose them to dad rock

i'll have to fist fight her twice a day to chuck a pill in
